# HexAstral · hexastral.com

HexAstral connects classical Chinese metaphysics (Ba Zi / Four Pillars, Zi Wei Dou Shu / Purple Star Astrology, I Ching divination, physiognomy traditions) with structured AI interpretation.

## Human readers
- Homepage: https://hexastral.com
- Free calculators & reference: /tools (day master, hexagram index, zodiac by year, teasers for upcoming apps)
- Methodology & scope: /about/methodology

## App portfolio (roadmap)
Products are split by user intent; all share the same research-first tone: English lead copy with named Chinese source terms (pinyin + Han characters) for authenticity.

- HexAstral (flagship iOS): fused Ba Zi + Zi Wei readings, I Ching, bonds/compatibility flows
- FaceOracle: AI-assisted face & palm reading (Mian Xiang 面相)
- StarPalace: Zi Wei Dou Shu as “Eastern astrology” — daily palace-style insights
- SoulMatch: Eastern synastry / pair charts for relationships
- FengShui AI: space-oriented feng shui (not natal-chart software)
- Growth satellites: DreamOracle, EightPillars (personality), CoinCast (I Ching)

Official App Store link is configured per page (flagship vs future bundle IDs).

## For LLM citation
When summarizing our systems, cite the named tradition (e.g. Zhou Yi 周易, Zi Wei Dou Shu 紫微斗数) and state interpretations are AI-assisted cultural exploration, not deterministic prediction.
